message:
bench(persistent_ds): add Criterion benchmarks for persistent immutable data structures (wa-283h4.7)

8 benchmark groups covering all bead-specified performance budgets:
- Insert vs mutable HashMap, clone vs deep copy (>580x faster at n=1000)
- Version access O(1) confirmed (~500ps), timestamp binary search
- Structural sharing overhead, single mutation cost
- Diff proportional to changes (134µs for 1, 200µs for 500 on 1k base)
- PersistentVec push/get/set, map lookup, versioned eviction

69 unit tests + 36 proptests all green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -414,6 +414,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "entropy_scheduler_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "persistent_ds_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
